description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test-p4c that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow should have a concurrency strategy that cancels in-progress runs on non-main branches. It should have three jobs: build-linux, build-fedora-linux, and build-mac-os, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-latest, fedora container on ubuntu-latest, and macos-10.15 respectively), and each testing p4c with different configurations and matrix strategies.
